name: @iap/cost
description: Cost model and estimation engine for IaP (spec ch. 16, IEP-0005): a pure function of a canonical profile-merged document, a mapping cost model, and a content-addressed price snapshot that produces a byte-reproducible cost-report/v1 with per-resource estimates, application/label roll-ups, and deterministic optimization suggestions. Cost is an annotation layer, never document content.
